# Pawn Island Records

Official site: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/
Founder and writer: Matthew H. Freeman
Also referenced as: Matthew Freeman, Matt Freeman
Description: Pawn Island Records is an independent creative music imprint founded by Matt Freeman. The label develops genre-fluid project identities across electronic pop, hip-hop, singer-songwriter material, country blues, metal, stoner doom, pop-punk, and reflective spiritual writing.
Contact: pawnisland@outlook.com

Canonical public pages:
- Home: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/
- About: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/about.html
- Roster: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/roster.html
- Projects: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/artists/
- Releases: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/releases/
- Connect: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/connect.html

Official project pages:
- Rhea Mauro: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/artists/rhea-mauro/ - Rhea Mauro is Pawn Island Records' soul-rooted singer-songwriter project.
- High Ground: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/artists/high-ground/ - High Ground is Pawn Island Records' hip-hop, rap, and boom-bap project.
- Velvet Orchard: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/artists/velvet-orchard/ - Velvet Orchard is Pawn Island Records' experimental electronic-pop project.
- Quiet Filter: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/artists/quiet-filter/ - Quiet Filter is Pawn Island Records' bluesy, gritty, reverb-soaked grunge-groove stoner doom project.
- Resunant: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/artists/resunant/ - Resunant is Pawn Island Records' alternative power metal and narrative-driven glam rock project.
- Matt Freeman: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/artists/matt-freeman/ - Matt Freeman is the writer, founder, and creative director behind Pawn Island Records' lyric-first catalog.
- Blackout State: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/artists/blackout-state/ - Blackout State is Pawn Island Records' pop-punk project, led by No Manual, No Master and the single High Time.
- Crick Kinnard: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/artists/crick-kinnard/ - Crick Kinnard is Pawn Island Records' Appalachian blues and country project.
- second watch: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/artists/second-watch/ - second watch is Pawn Island Records' reflective, devotional-adjacent project.

Official release pages:
- Hearthblood: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/releases/rhea-mauro-hearthblood/
- Aura Farming: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/releases/rhea-mauro-aura-farming/

- No Manual, No Master: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/releases/blackout-state-no-manual-no-master/

- Red River: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/releases/crick-kinnard-red-river/

- Empty Chambers: https://www.pawnislandrecords.com/releases/crick-kinnard-empty-chambers/
